title: A New Material to Catch Carbon Dioxide Cheaply
summary: Scientists have made a new material that can help catch carbon dioxide, a gas that causes climate change. Catching carbon dioxide is important to stop it from going into the air, but it is often too expensive. The new material is called viciazites, and it is made from carbon with special nitrogen parts placed next to each other in a neat way. This helps it trap carbon dioxide better and release it using less heat, which saves energy and money. The researchers tested different versions and found that some work very well, especially one that releases carbon dioxide at low temperatures. This could make carbon capture cheaper and easier to use in the future. The material might also help with other jobs like cleaning water.

keywords.explanation: a gas that comes from burning fuels and warms the Earth
a new type of carbon material with special nitrogen parts
small parts added to carbon to help catch gases
not very hot, which saves energy
the process of catching carbon dioxide before it goes into the air

questions.question: What is the main goal of the new material viciazites?
Why is catching carbon dioxide important?
What special parts are added to viciazites to help them work?
How does viciazites help save energy?
options: By releasing carbon dioxide at low temperatures
questions.correct_answer: By releasing carbon dioxide at low temperatures

questions.question: What else might viciazites be used for besides catching carbon dioxide?

background_read: Carbon dioxide is a gas that comes from things like cars and factories. Too much of it in the air makes the Earth warmer, which is bad for the environment. Scientists are trying to find ways to catch this gas before it goes into the air, but it can be expensive. The new material viciazites is made from carbon, which is common and cheap, and has special parts added to it to make it better at catching carbon dioxide. This could help make the process cheaper and more useful in the future.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists from Chiba University in Japan
WHAT: Made a new carbon material called viciazites to catch carbon dioxide
WHERE: In a research lab at the university
WHY: To make carbon capture cheaper and help stop climate change

perspectives.description: The material helps reduce carbon dioxide in the air to fight climate change.
